Package pl.pjatk.MATLOG.domain

Class PrivateLesson

java.lang.Object
pl.pjatk.MATLOG.domain.PrivateLesson
public final class PrivateLesson extends Object
Class representing Private Lesson in application. Private Lesson is a lesson that is taught by Tutor to Student. It can be created by Tutor to create slot in the calendar that can be booked by Student.

  • Constructor Details

    • PrivateLesson

      private PrivateLesson(List<SchoolSubject> schoolSubjects, String tutorId, LocalDateTime startTime, LocalDateTime endTime, Double price)
      Private Constructor of the PrivateLesson. This constructor is used by the Builder.
      Parameters:
      schoolSubjects - List of SchoolSubjects that will be taught during the lesson.
      tutorId - Identification of Tutor that will lead the lesson
      startTime - Start time of the lesson
      endTime - End time of the lesson
      price - Price of the lesson
      Throws:
      PrivateLessonInvalidSchoolSubjectException - When schoolSubjects are empty
      PrivateLessonInvalidIdException - When tutorId is empty
      IllegalStateException - When start time is empty
      IllegalStateException - When end time is empty
      PrivateLessonInvalidPriceException - When price is null or negative
      PrivateLessonInvalidStartTimeException - When start time is before current time
      PrivateLessonInvalidEndTimeException - When end time is before current time, before start time or equals start time

  • Method Details

    • validateFields

      private void validateFields()
      Method that validates all fields of the PrivateLesson.
